audit_items.proof_trace: Both callers of ldap_build_add_req() properly NULL-check the return value before any dereference. In ldap_add_ext (add.c:224), `if (!ber) return ld->ld_errno;` unconditionally returns on NULL before the ber is passed to ldap_send_initial_request at line 228. In asyncmeta_back_add_start (back-asyncmeta/add.c:143-150), `if (!ber) { goto done; }` routes the NULL case to the cleanup label before any BerElement access, and all subsequent ber usage is additionally guarded by a redundant `if (ber)` block at line 152.
